structs.nested_0: STRUCT<a_1 INT, nested_1 STRUCT<a_2 INT, nested_2 STRUCT<a_3 INT>>>

cases.expected: SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x
SELECT x.b AS b FROM x AS x

cases.sql: SELECT x.a FROM x AS x CROSS JOIN (SELECT * FROM x)
cases.expected: SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x CROSS JOIN (SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x) AS _0

cases.sql: SELECT x.b FROM x AS x CROSS JOIN (SELECT b FROM x)
cases.expected: SELECT x.b AS b FROM x AS x CROSS JOIN (SELECT x.b AS b FROM x AS x) AS _0
SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x

cases.sql: SELECT * FROM y CROSS JOIN z ON y.b = z.b
cases.expected: SELECT y.b AS b, z.b AS b FROM y AS y CROSS JOIN z AS z ON y.b = z.b

cases.sql: SELECT * FROM y CROSS JOIN z ON y.c = z.c
cases.expected: SELECT y.b AS b, z.b AS b FROM y AS y CROSS JOIN z AS z ON y.c = z.c
SELECT _0.a AS a FROM (SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x) AS _0
SELECT _0.a AS a FROM (SELECT x.a AS a FROM x AS x) AS _0
